name: user_insights_get
description: Retrieve account-level insights for a business or creator account over a time period. Includes impressions, reach, follower count, profile views, and audience demographics.

parameters.name: metric
parameters.description: Comma-separated metrics: impressions, reach, follower_count, profile_views, website_clicks, email_contacts, get_directions_clicks, phone_call_clicks, text_message_clicks.

parameters.name: period
parameters.description: Time granularity for the metrics. One of: day, week, days_28, month, lifetime.

parameters.name: since
parameters.description: Unix timestamp for the start of the time range.

parameters.name: until
parameters.description: Unix timestamp for the end of the time range.
